title: Simplify env to minimal operator config
summary: Update .env.example to the minimal operator-level configuration (secrets + intent), slim local .env to match (untracked), and add lightweight README documentation describing the minimal operator config and derived runtime policy. Backward compatibility is preserved in code (legacy env vars remain supported as overrides).
why_safe: .env.example/README changes are documentation only; runtime logic is unchanged.
Legacy env vars remain supported in code; this change only makes the minimal set the preferred operator surface.
commit_message: Simplify env to minimal operator config
notes_for_cursor: Commit only .env.example, README.md, and workflow artifacts. Do not commit .env.
